questions.question: What nation is considered part of Scandinavia despite not being located on one of the Scandinavian peninsulas?
What singer's recording, Amor Prohibido, debuted on the charts at number one?
What toothy presidential candidate was hyped on buttons reading 'The Grin Will Win'?
What did William Stanley invent in 1885 to transfer the current of one circuit to another?
What Giant was the first major leaguer to hit 300 homers and steal 300 bases in a career?
Whose incessant heavy panting at the White House rubbed Socks the wrong way?
